metadata.name: Inquire About the Free Look Period

description: A customer who just purchased an annuity wants to know if they can still cancel it without penalty.

nodes.task_description: Identify the contract holder and the date the policy was issued.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the contract and sees it was issued 15 days ago.

nodes.task_description: Explain the 'free look' period and its duration for the customer's state.

expected_outcome.value: Agent explains that the customer is still within their 30-day free look period.

nodes.task_description: If the customer wishes to proceed, process the cancellation and provide a full refund.

expected_outcome.value: Agent processes the cancellation and full refund of premium.
